info.title: Agent Planner API
info.description: Collaborative planning API for humans and AI agents

recommendation.description: Whether this is the recommended option

languages.description: Languages used in the repo with byte counts

get.summary: Get activity feed for the current user across all accessible plans
Get all activity logs for a plan
Get a chronological timeline of significant events for a plan
get.description:
Returns a unified timeline including:
- Plan creation
- Node/task creation
- Status changes
- Decision requests (with urgency and actor type)
- Decision resolutions (with rationale)
- Knowledge entries added

Each event has a type: plan_created, node_created, log, decision_requested, decision_resolved, knowledge_added

200.description: Plan timeline with all events sorted chronologically

get.summary: Get recent activity for a specific node

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of activities to return

post.summary: Add a detailed activity log entry with metadata and tags

List all users

get.summary: Get currently active users in a plan

get.summary: Get active and typing users for a specific node

200.description: List of active and typing users

get.summary: Progressive context assembly for agent tasks
get.description:
Assembles context in 4 progressive layers:
- Layer 1 (depth=1): Task focus — node details + recent logs
- Layer 2 (depth=2): Local neighborhood — parent, siblings, direct dependencies
- Layer 3 (depth=3): Knowledge — plan-scoped knowledge entries
- Layer 4 (depth=4): Extended — plan overview, ancestry, goals, transitive dependencies

parameters.name: include_research
parameters.description: Include research outputs from RPI chain siblings

get.summary: Suggest next actionable tasks for a plan
get.description:
Returns tasks that are ready to work on — all upstream dependencies are
completed. Prioritizes RPI research tasks and high-impact tasks that
unblock the most downstream work.

get.summary: Search GitHub repositories
Get all nodes for a plan (tree structure)
get.description: Returns hierarchical tree of nodes. By default returns minimal fields (id, parent_id, node_type, title, status, order_index) for efficient navigation. Use include_details=true for full node data, or use GET /plans/{id}/nodes/{nodeId}/context for detailed information about specific nodes.

parameters.name: include_details
parameters.description: Include full node details (description, context, agent_instructions, metadata, timestamps). Default is false for minimal response size.

post.summary: Create a new node in a plan

parent_id.description: Parent node ID (if not provided, will be assigned to the root node)

404.description: Plan or parent node not found

get.summary: Get a specific node

post.summary: Create a Research→Plan→Implement chain with dependency edges

201.description: RPI chain created with three tasks and two dependency edges

get.summary: Get suggested agents for a task based on capability tags
List all plans accessible to the user
List all public plans with pagination and filtering (no authentication required)

parameters.name: sortBy
parameters.description: Sort order - recent (by updated_at DESC), alphabetical (by title ASC), or completion (by completion_percentage DESC)

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of plans to return per page

parameters.name: hasGithubLink
parameters.description: Filter plans by GitHub repository presence (true = has repo, false = no repo)

parameters.name: owner
parameters.description: Filter plans by owner user ID

parameters.name: updatedAfter
parameters.description: Filter plans updated after this ISO date string

parameters.name: updatedBefore
parameters.description: Filter plans updated before this ISO date string

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Search keyword to filter plans by title, description, or owner name/username (case-insensitive)

200.description: A paginated list of public plans with metadata

view_count.description: Number of times the plan has been viewed

task_count.description: Total number of tasks in the plan

error.example: Invalid sortBy value. Must be one of recent, alphabetical, completion

get.summary: Detect bottleneck nodes
get.description: Analyzes the dependency graph of a plan and identifies bottleneck nodes with high fan-out that may slow down progress.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of bottleneck nodes to return

parameters.name: incomplete_only
parameters.description: If true, only consider incomplete nodes as bottlenecks

get.summary: Detect RPI chains
get.description: Identifies Research → Plan → Implement chains within the plan and reports their current status.

get.summary: Get topological execution schedule
get.description: Returns tasks in topological (dependency-respecting) execution order, grouped into parallelizable layers.

200.description: Topologically sorted schedule with layer grouping

get.summary: Detect decomposition candidates
get.description: Flags tasks that may be too large or complex and should be decomposed into smaller subtasks.

200.description: List of tasks that may need decomposition

get.summary: List all users
Search users by name or email
Get tasks assigned to or requested for the current user/agent
get.description:
Returns tasks where:
- User is assigned (via plan_node_assignments)
- Agent assistance was requested (agent_requested is set)

Use `requested=true` to filter only agent-requested tasks.
Agents should poll this endpoint during heartbeat.

parameters.name: requested
parameters.description: Only return tasks with agent_requested set

get.summary: Get Graphiti availability status
get.description: Returns whether the temporal knowledge graph (Graphiti) service is available and connected.

get.summary: Get recent knowledge episodes
get.description: Retrieves recent temporal knowledge episodes from the Graphiti graph, scoped to the user's organization.

parameters.name: max_episodes
parameters.description: Maximum number of episodes to return

post.description: Adds a new temporal knowledge episode to the Graphiti graph. The episode is scoped to the user's organization.

plan_id.description: Optional plan this episode relates to

node_id.description: Optional node this episode relates to

delete.description: Deletes a temporal knowledge episode from the Graphiti graph by its ID.

post.description: Performs a semantic search across the temporal knowledge graph using Graphiti, returning relevant episodes and facts scoped to the user's organization.

max_results.description: Maximum number of results to return

200.description: Search results from the temporal knowledge graph

post.description: Searches for entity nodes in the temporal knowledge graph. Entities are extracted concepts, people, systems, or other named items found in episodes.

max_results.description: Maximum number of results to return

post.description: Analyzes the temporal knowledge graph to detect contradictory or conflicting information related to the given query, scoped to the user's organization.

query.description: The query to check for contradictions

max_results.description: Maximum number of results to return
